subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto every possessor of ears, and a Book from Our presence unto every one endued with power who standeth firm in the Cause of God, the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لکل ذی اذن و کتاب من عندنا لکل ذی قوه کان مستقیما فی امر الله رب
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @justice and wrath of God
